variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16037 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16037 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16037 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P771532 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16037
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P771532 Air Filter, Primary Round is crafted to provide outstanding engine protection by filtering out dust, dirt, and debris before they reach the combustion chamber. Its round design maximizes airflow while maintaining exceptional filtration efficiency, supporting better fuel economy and engine performance. Perfect for trucks, heavy machinery, and industrial equipment, this filter is built to withstand harsh conditions. Its durable construction extends service intervals, reducing maintenance frequency and ensuring long-lasting engine health.

variants.title: FIL Filter HP 4712 Filter Insert | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16037
variants.description: Genuine FIL Filter HP 4712. Easy to install and replace, the HP 4712 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25331 Air, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16037
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25331 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
